title: Add a Caching Layer
description: Introduce caching to a hot path correctly.
content:
I want to cache: {{what}}

Design the cache: the key, what to store, the eviction policy, and the TTL. Critically, define the INVALIDATION strategy: when does cached data go stale and how is it refreshed? Handle the cache-stampede and stale-read cases. Tell me how I will measure hit rate and whether this cache is even worth it.
